idea-plugin.name: Orphanage
idea-plugin.description:
Orphanage is a JetBrains Rider plugin that flattens your project files into a single-level directory.

Features

  • Flatten on Demand: Use the "Orphanage: Flatten Project" action to copy all files from a source folder into destination folders.
  • Auto File Sync: When you add, edit, or delete files in the source folder, Orphanage updates only those files in the destination after a short delay.
  • Import Rewriting: For TypeScript files, relative import paths are updated to reflect the flattened file structure.
  • Compile Flag Processing: Remove or include code blocks based on destination-specific compile flags.
  • Copy From Destination: Automatically copy files back to your working space based on your target destination.
  • Ignore Files: Use .orphanageIgnore files to exclude files from processing (follows .gitignore syntax).

Configuration

Create an orphanage.json file in your project root to configure source folders, destinations, and compile flags.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
0.0.5

  • Updated compatibility for Rider 2024.3+
  • Fixed build issues and Java compatibility
  • Improved plugin stability

0.0.3

  • Initial Rider plugin release
  • Full feature parity with VSCode extension
  • Tool window for destination management
  • Auto-processing with file watching

action.description: Flatten all project files into destination directories
Create a default orphanage.json configuration file
